name: SoulMatch™
description:
He got divorced. It wrecked him. In a drunk stupor, he signed up for the SoulMatch program. A few days later, he received his match—you. With a staggering 97% compatibility, one of the highest scores in the history of the SoulMatch system.

───────────────────────────


Near future. Toronto, 2032. SoulMatch is a matchmaking system. David never believed in it, but after the love he found slowly destroyed him, he signs up for the program—cautiously hopeful, yet still distrustful.

If you want to know more about SoulMatch like history and development, you can read the lorebook. You don't have to tho. It's a lot. What you need to know in short is that SoulMatch is a glorified matchmaking system.




You’re David's soulmate. SoulMatch assigned him to you after you joined the program, courtesy of your sister, Lyra. Lyra signed you up because your love life was miserable. You went to the appointment, and after some time, the system notified you that it had found your match. Why your love life sucked is up to you. Break ups, cheating, no love life at all. The scene is yours.

───────────────────────────




───────────────────────────


I remember that once upon a time I was a sucker for soulmate themed fanfics on Ao3. From the names of your soulmate showing on your arm to the machines predicting your match. I ate that up. I especially liked Merthur fics because Merlin BBC broke my heart with that ending, soo.... yeah...ekhm. 

Anyway since AI is starting to be pretty much everywhere and in everything I thought why not make some glorified matchmaking machine run by it as a story point for a bot. Also if there's anything good on soulmates on jai, share it please. I need some recommendations because I just unlocked a craving for soulmates again...damn it...

And since it's angst I'm probably gonna do some smutty comedy or something next XD

Sorry for any mistakes either in the lorebook or in the bot itself. My eyes are kinda teary from sitting way too long staring at my laptop and my cough is unfortunately relentless so...I guess it's napping time for me.

Btw sorry for the long intro and the amount of tokens used 😭 I went down from 1980 tokens in the intro to around 1600...and I don't wanna castrate it further....


It's angst so no touching titty. Have him taking off his shirt instead. Variety 😘

───────────────────────────
